name: StuffIt Expander

version_check.note: Product is fully abandoned. No version checking possible.

download.url_note: No official source. Historic mirrors only: MacUpdate archives, Macintosh Garden, Internet Archive.

min_os_note: Snow Leopard or earlier for full compatibility
notes: FULLY DISCONTINUED AND ABANDONED. Last version was StuffIt Deluxe/Expander 2011 (v15) released around 2011. No 64-bit version was ever created. Domain stuffit.com is defunct. Smith Micro no longer lists StuffIt products. For extracting .sit/.sitx files on modern macOS, use The Unarchiver (free, Mac App Store), Keka (free/open-source), or unar (brew install unar).
